# center

**Instance Property**

The center of the skybox.

## Declaration

```swift
var center: GLKVector3 { get set }
```

## Discussion

The property holds the `[x,y,z]` coordinates of the center of the skybox.

## Configuring the Skybox

- **textureCubeMap**: The texture to apply to the skybox.
- **xSize**: The width of the skybox.
- **ySize**: The height of the skybox.
- **zSize**: The depth of the skybox.

items.description: The texture to apply to the skybox.
